title: Supply Chain Manager - Swiggy Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Swiggy Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Swiggy Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Swiggy Logistics:
Swiggy Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Logistics!
